# aws/s3

AWS S3 object storage MCP server. Upload, download, list, and manage S3 objects with multi-format support.

## MCP Server

- **Package**: `@geunoh/s3-mcp-server`
- **Transport**: stdio
- **Command**: `npx -y @geunoh/s3-mcp-server`

## Authentication

AWS IAM credentials

| Variable | Required | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` | Yes | AWS access key |
| `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` | Yes | AWS secret key |
| `AWS_REGION` | No | AWS region |
| `S3_BUCKET` | No | Target S3 bucket |

## Available Tools

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `list_objects` | List S3 objects |
| `get_object` | Download object |
| `put_object` | Upload object |
| `delete_object` | Delete object |

## Configuration Example

```toml
[[mcp.servers]]
name = "s3"
type = "stdio"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@geunoh/s3-mcp-server"]
timeout_seconds = 60
env = { AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID = "your-value", AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY = "your-value", AWS_REGION = "your-value", S3_BUCKET = "your-value" }
tools = []
```

**Notes:** Supports PDF reading, image processing, XML/JSON parsing.
